summary: **What this is:** a synthesis of the two independent subjective analyses run at the post-batch-2 milestone — Fable (`scratchpad/subj-fable.out`, archived under `poc/gpt56-review/subj-fable-20260711/` at commit) and GPT-5.6 (`poc/gpt56-review/subj-gpt56-20260711/`). title: Programme-3 — Round-2 subjective steering note (coordinator synthesis)
